name: ListMandates
description: List all mandates for a specific customer. Mandates represent payment authorizations for recurring charges. This endpoint returns all mandate records associated with a customer, showing their status (valid, invalid, pending), payment method, and consumer details. Useful for managing recurring payment authorizations and checking which mandates are available for charging.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer to list mandates for (e.g., 'cst_abc123'). This customer must exist in your account.

from_.description: Optional cursor for pagination. Use the 'next' value from a previous list response to retrieve the next page of results.

limit.description: Optional number of mandates to return per page (default 50, maximum 250). Use for pagination control.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode mandates, or omit for live mode.
